demo_timestamps.description: Demonstration of project request process in PCT.
Demo of intelligent and data-driven project setup in PCT.
Demonstrating listing of available ACC hubs and querying project data

client_mentions.name: Arcades
client_mentions.context: Arcades is described as a global design engineering firm implementing PCT.

ai_technologies.name: Azure OpenAI
ai_technologies.context: Used to create recommendations and summaries from Trace data foundation

summary: The video explores the scaling of enterprise project lifecycle management for 40,000 users using Autodesk Platform Services and the Project Control Tool (PCT) to automate and standardize workflows. It highlights how Arcades employs automation, data-driven insights, and AI to efficiently manage complex projects, integrating technologies like Microsoft Fabric and Azure OpenAI to transform fragmented data into actionable insights and enhance project management workflows. Demonstrations include the PCT's project request process and the implementation of intelligent project setup.
